---
title: "geneAnnotationMCP: driving LLM interaction to deterministic gene annotation"
author: "Vincent J. Carey, stvjc at channing.harvard.edu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    highlight: pygments
    number_sections: yes
    theme: united
    toc: yes
---

# Example 1

This is for a first draft.  An iteration was taken with two tool calls,
evidently to simplify the syntax of tool outputs.  One could introduce
prompt enhancement to avoid wrapping scalars as JSON, or do server-side
sanitization to avoid this.  So far the system seems capable of recovery.

```
> ch$chat("What human genes are associated with regulation of mesenchymal cell proliferation?")

◯ [tool call] fn_go_to_genes(go_id = "[\"GO:0010464\"]", max_genes = "[50]")
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"error":{"code":-32603,"message":"'[\"GO:0010464\"]' is not a valid GO ID."}}

◯ [tool call] fn_go_to_genes(go_id = "GO:0010464", max_genes = 50L)
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Genes annotated to GO:0010464 (regulation…
Based on the gene ontology annotation, here are the human genes associated with regulation of mesenchymal cell 
proliferation (GO:0010464):

1. **BMP4** (Entrez: 652) [IDA]
2. **CHRD** (Entrez: 8646) [TAS]
3. **CTNNBIP1** (Entrez: 56998) [IDA]
4. **FGFR2** (Entrez: 2263) [ISS]
5. **ISL1** (Entrez: 3670) [IEA]
6. **LRP5** (Entrez: 4041) [IMP]
7. **MYC** (Entrez: 4609) [IDA]
8. **NFIB** (Entrez: 4781) [IDA]
9. **PDGFA** (Entrez: 5154) [TAS]
10. **PHF14** (Entrez: 9678) [ISS]
11. **SHH** (Entrez: 6469) [ISS]
12. **SOX9** (Entrez: 6662) [IBA]
13. **STAT1** (Entrez: 6772) [ISS]
14. **TBX1** (Entrez: 6899) [IBA]
15. **TGFBR2** (Entrez: 7048) [IEA]
16. **WNT5A** (Entrez: 7474) [IEP]

These genes are involved in various aspects of mesenchymal cell proliferation regulation, including signaling pathways 
(BMP, Wnt, TGF-beta), transcription factors (MYC, SOX9, TBX1), growth factors (PDGF, FGF), and key regulatory molecules
(CTNNBIP1, LRP5). The evidence codes indicate the type of experimental support for each annotation (IDA = Inferred from
Direct Assay, TAS = Traceable Author Statement, etc.).
```

# Example 2

```
> ch$chat("What human genes are associated with positive regulation of immunoglobulin production?")

◯ [tool call] fn_search_go_terms(query = "positive regulation of immunoglobulin production", ...)
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"GO term search for 'positive regulation o…

◯ [tool call] fn_go_to_genes(go_id = "[\"GO:0002639\"]", max_genes = "[50]")
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"error":{"code":-32603,"message":"'[\"GO:0002639\"]' is not a valid GO ID."}}

◯ [tool call] fn_go_to_genes(go_id = "[\"GO:0002639\"]", max_genes = "[50]")
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"error":{"code":-32603,"message":"'[\"GO:0002639\"]' is not a valid GO ID."}}

◯ [tool call] fn_go_to_genes(go_id = "GO:0002639", max_genes = 50L)
● #> {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Genes annotated to GO:0002639 (positive r…
Here are the human genes associated with positive regulation of immunoglobulin production (GO:0002639):

1. **BTK** (Entrez: 695) [IEA]
2. **C17orf99** (Entrez: 100141515) [IEA]
3. **CD86** (Entrez: 942) [IEA]
4. **CLCF1** (Entrez: 23529) [IEA]
5. **DNAJB9** (Entrez: 4189) [IEA]
6. **EPHB2** (Entrez: 2048) [IEA]
7. **GALNT2** (Entrez: 2590) [NAS]
8. **GPI** (Entrez: 2821) [IDA]
9. **HLA-E** (Entrez: 3133) [IEA]
10. **HMCES** (Entrez: 56941) [IEA]
11. **IL10** (Entrez: 3586) [IDA]
12. **IL13** (Entrez: 3596) [IEA]
13. **IL2** (Entrez: 3558) [IEA]
14. **IL21** (Entrez: 59067) [IBA]
15. **IL33** (Entrez: 90865) [IMP]
16. **IL4** (Entrez: 3565) [IDA]
17. **IL5** (Entrez: 3567) [IEA]
18. **IL6** (Entrez: 3569) [IDA]
19. **KMT5B** (Entrez: 51111) [IEA]
20. **KMT5C** (Entrez: 84787) [IEA]
21. **MAD2L2** (Entrez: 10459) [IDA]
22. **MLH1** (Entrez: 4292) [IEA]
23. **MSH2** (Entrez: 4436) [IEA]
24. **MZB1** (Entrez: 51237) [IEA]
25. **PAXIP1** (Entrez: 22976) [IEA]
26. **PHB1** (Entrez: 5245) [IDA]
27. **PHB2** (Entrez: 11331) [IDA]
28. **PMS2** (Entrez: 5395) [IEA]
29. **PTPRC** (Entrez: 5788) [IGI]
30. **RBP4** (Entrez: 5950) [IEA]
31. **RIF1** (Entrez: 55183) [IEA]
32. **SASH3** (Entrez: 54440) [IBA]
33. **SHLD1** (Entrez: 149840) [NAS]
34. **SHLD2** (Entrez: 54537) [NAS]
35. **SHLD3** (Entrez: 112441434) [NAS]
36. **STX4** (Entrez: 6810) [IBA]
37. **TFRC** (Entrez: 7037) [IEA]
38. **TGFB1** (Entrez: 7040) [IEA]
39. **TLR9** (Entrez: 54106) [IEA]
40. **TNF** (Entrez: 7124) [IDA]
41. **TNFRSF4** (Entrez: 7293) [ISS]
42. **TNFSF13** (Entrez: 8741) [IBA]
43. **TNFSF4** (Entrez: 7292) [ISS]
44. **TP53BP1** (Entrez: 7158) [IBA]
45. **XBP1** (Entrez: 7494) [IDA]
46. **XCL1** (Entrez: 6375) [IDA]

These genes are involved in various aspects of immunoglobulin production regulation, including signaling pathways, 
transcription factors, cytokines, and immune response molecules. The evidence codes indicate the type of experimental 
support for each annotation (IDA = Inferred from Direct Assay, IEA = Inferred from Electronic Annotation, etc.).
> 
```

# Session information


```
> sessionInfo()
R version 4.6.0 alpha (2026-03-30 r89743)
Platform: aarch64-apple-darwin23
Running under: macOS Sequoia 15.7.4

Matrix products: default
BLAS:   /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.6/Resources/lib/libRblas.0.dylib 
LAPACK: /Library/Frameworks/R.framework/Versions/4.6/Resources/lib/libRlapack.dylib;  LAPACK version 3.12.1

locale:
[1] en_US.UTF-8/en_US.UTF-8/en_US.UTF-8/C/en_US.UTF-8/en_US.UTF-8

time zone: America/New_York
tzcode source: internal

attached base packages:
[1] stats     graphics  grDevices utils     datasets  methods   base     

other attached packages:
[1] mcptools_0.2.1 ellmer_0.4.0   devtools_2.5.0 usethis_3.2.1  rmarkdown_2.31

loaded via a namespace (and not attached):
 [1] jsonlite_2.0.0    compiler_4.6.0    promises_1.5.0    Rcpp_1.1.1       
 [5] later_1.4.8       fastmap_1.2.0     R6_2.6.1          curl_7.0.0       
 [9] httr2_1.2.2       knitr_1.51        rlang_1.1.7       cachem_1.1.0     
[13] xfun_0.57         fs_2.0.1          S7_0.2.1          pkgload_1.5.0    
[17] otel_0.2.0        memoise_2.0.1     cli_3.6.5         withr_3.0.2      
[21] magrittr_2.0.4    ps_1.9.1          digest_0.6.39     processx_3.8.6   
[25] rappdirs_0.3.4    lifecycle_1.0.5   coro_1.1.0        vctrs_0.7.2      
[29] startup_0.23.0    evaluate_1.0.5    glue_1.8.0        sessioninfo_1.2.3
[33] pkgbuild_1.4.8    purrr_1.2.1       tools_4.6.0       ellipsis_0.3.2   
[37] htmltools_0.5.9  
```
